'''wakutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pocketing|pocketing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pocketing|pocketing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wakutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wækitith|wækitith]] || [[word:wækitij|wækitij]] || [[word:wækitish|wækitish]] || [[word:wækiti|wækiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wakukututh|wakukututh]] || [[word:wakukutuj|wakukutuj]] || [[word:wakukutush|wakukutush]] || [[word:wakukutu|wakukutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wakututh|wakututh]] || [[word:wakutuj|wakutuj]] || [[word:wakutush|wakutush]] || [[word:wakutu|wakutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wakuftuth|wakuftuth]] || [[word:wakuftuj|wakuftuj]] || [[word:wakuftush|wakuftush]] || [[word:wakuftuf|wakuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wakututhu|wakututhu]] || [[word:wakutuju|wakutuju]] || [[word:wakutushu|wakutushu]] || [[word:wakutuku|wakutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wakututh|wakututh]] || [[word:wakutuj|wakutuj]] || [[word:wakutush|wakutush]] || [[word:wakutu|wakutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wakututhul|wakututhul]] || [[word:wakutujul|wakutujul]] || [[word:wakutushul|wakutushul]] || [[word:wakutukul|wakutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wakututhuthu|wakututhuthu]] || [[word:wakutujuju|wakutujuju]] || [[word:wakutushushu|wakutushushu]] || [[word:wakutuku|wakutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wakututhun|wakututhun]] || [[word:wakutujun|wakutujun]] || [[word:wakutushun|wakutushun]] || [[word:wakutukun|wakutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wakututhuoro|wakututhuoro]] || [[word:wakutujuoro|wakutujuoro]] || [[word:wakutushuoro|wakutushuoro]] || [[word:wakutukuoro|wakutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
